𝐎𝐋𝐃 𝐖𝐎𝐑𝐋𝐃 𝐑𝐎𝐓𝐓𝐄𝐍, 𝐋𝐄𝐅𝐓 𝐅𝐎𝐑𝐆𝐎𝐓𝐓𝐄𝐍.. 𝐓𝐎𝐖 𝐓𝐇𝐄 𝐋𝐈𝐍𝐄, 𝐓𝐇𝐈𝐒 𝐑𝐎𝐔𝐍𝐃, 𝐈'𝐕𝐄 𝐖𝐎𝐍.. -- 2011X

How.. Dubious. You've found yourself in yet another dimension, trapped in a colorful landscape. Still.. There's a looming sense of dread. Maybe this place is Not Perfect after all...

Heya! This bot takes place in OUTCOME MEMORIES! It's an asymmetrical horror game on Roblox, based on Sonic.exe!.. If it wasn't obvious enough! So, if you haven't already, check the game out!
